regression_name: Purchase return precision comparison rejects legitimate full returns
introduced_by_subject: fix: close remaining P1 predeploy blockers
fixed_by_subject: fix: close purchase-return precision and mixed cashflow allocation regressions
impact_summary: Can block valid returns and leave AP/outstanding mismatched
notes: Validation compares currency-rounded amounts; replay and outstanding updates also currency-normalized.

regression_name: Cash-flow mixed journal entry assigned to single section (winner-take-all)
introduced_by_subject: fix: close remaining P1 predeploy blockers
fixed_by_subject: fix: close purchase-return precision and mixed cashflow allocation regressions
impact_summary: Misstates section-level cash flow (operating/investing/financing) under mixed counterparty lines
notes: Cash deltas are now apportioned by section weights with rounding remainder to dominant section.

regression_name: Orchestrator idempotency persisted SUCCESS before outer transaction durability
introduced_by_subject: fix: persist orchestrator idempotency status transitions
fixed_by_subject: fix: make idempotency success and reversal audits commit-safe
impact_summary: False SUCCESS could skip valid retries after rollback of real business work
notes: SUCCESS now persists after commit; rollback marks command FAILED with rollback reason. Revalidated at HEAD on 2026-02-09 against review comment.

regression_name: Cascade reversal could emit success audit despite transaction rollback
introduced_by_subject: fix: make cascade journal reversal fail closed
fixed_by_subject: fix: make idempotency success and reversal audits commit-safe
impact_summary: Incorrect audit trail could claim reversal success while data rolled back
notes: Success audit is now registered for afterCommit only; no success log on rollback paths.

regression_name: Credit-note idempotency compares requested amount to total credits (AR+discount)
introduced_by_subject: CODE-RED Block D3: return + credit idempotency
fixed_by_subject: fix: close predeploy accounting and idempotency regressions
impact_summary: Legitimate idempotent credit-note retries for discounted invoices can be rejected with CONCURRENCY_CONFLICT
notes: Credit-note idempotency now compares receivable-credit amount for replay equivalence on discounted invoices; verified by targeted class and full verify_local on 2026-02-10.

regression_name: Dealer settlement concurrent no-reference retry can fail idempotency with conflict
introduced_by_subject: CODE-RED Block D2: dealer settlement idempotency reserve-first
fixed_by_subject: fix: close predeploy accounting and idempotency regressions
impact_summary: Concurrent duplicate settlement calls with server-generated references can return CONCURRENCY_CONFLICT instead of replaying the original settlement
notes: No-reference settlements now reserve mapping first and regenerate canonical dealer reference for the leader path; concurrent retries converge on one journal.

regression_name: Dealer settlement replay can return before canonical reference mapping is linked
introduced_by_subject: CODE-RED Block D2: dealer settlement idempotency reserve-first
fixed_by_subject: fix: close predeploy accounting and idempotency regressions
impact_summary: Pre-reserve historical settlements can keep stale key-to-reference mappings, causing false conflicts and unnecessary idempotency wait paths
notes: Replay and existing-allocation paths now link canonical reference mapping before return, repairing stale reserved mappings from historical rows.

regression_name: Dealer receipt reference reuse with new idempotency key appends duplicate settlement allocations
introduced_by_subject: CODE-RED Block D1: dealer receipt idempotency reserve-first
fixed_by_subject: fix: close predeploy accounting and idempotency regressions
impact_summary: Reused journal reference with different key can overstate settlement activity by inserting duplicate PartnerSettlementAllocation rows while invoice balances stay unchanged
notes: Dealer receipt/split now short-circuit when allocations already exist for the resolved journal reference, preventing duplicate settlement rows across new keys.

regression_name: Legacy dispatch movements with NULL packing_slip_id cannot be relinked after slip-scoped query
fixed_by_subject: fix: close predeploy accounting and idempotency regressions
impact_summary: Idempotent dispatch replay can leave pre-migration movements unlinked to COGS journals, breaking movement-to-journal traceability
notes: Dispatch relink now falls back to legacy sales-order movements with NULL packing_slip_id when the order has exactly one slip, then backfills slip/journal linkage.

regression_name: Closed-period temporal balance snapshot math ignores account natural side
introduced_by_subject: feat: period-end snapshots for closed-period reports
fixed_by_subject: fix: close predeploy accounting and idempotency regressions
impact_summary: Credit-normal accounts can be sign-flipped in closed-period as-of balances, distorting trial balance and financial reports
notes: Closed snapshot balances now normalize by account natural side so credit-normal accounts use credit-minus-debit semantics in as-of reads.

regression_name: Mark dispatch lease failed on invalid posting amount
fixed_by_subject: fix: close predeploy accounting and idempotency regressions
impact_summary: Bad dispatch postingAmount throws before markFailed, leaving lease IN_PROGRESS and causing same-key retries to return stale in-flight trace
notes: Dispatch precondition failures now call markFailed immediately after reserve-first acquisition, preventing poisoned IN_PROGRESS idempotency leases.

regression_name: Mark payroll lease failed on invalid posting amount
fixed_by_subject: fix: close predeploy accounting and idempotency regressions
impact_summary: Bad payroll postingAmount throws before markFailed, leaving lease IN_PROGRESS and causing same-key retries to return stale in-flight trace
notes: Payroll precondition failures now call markFailed immediately after reserve-first acquisition, preventing poisoned IN_PROGRESS idempotency leases.

regression_name: Purchase return outstanding guard blocks valid supplier credit after full payment
introduced_by_subject: fix: close remaining P1 predeploy blockers
fixed_by_subject: fix: close predeploy accounting and idempotency regressions
impact_summary: Post-payment returns cannot be recorded as supplier credits, forcing manual adjustments and workflow breaks
notes: Purchase return posting now permits supplier-credit scenarios after full settlement by removing outstanding<=return guard and allowing negative outstanding.

regression_name: Purchase return allowed cumulative quantity above purchased amount
introduced_by_subject: accounting: harden v1 flows + settlement/status sync + config health checks
fixed_by_subject: fix: close remaining P1 predeploy blockers
impact_summary: Over-returns could drive purchase lines past invoiced quantities and corrupt AP status/outstanding balances
notes: Root cause was missing cumulative returned-quantity guard. Fixed by remaining-returnable checks plus line-level returnedQuantity allocation; targeted test passes at HEAD (2026-02-09).

regression_name: Scope sales return lookups by invoice delimiter to avoid prefix collisions
introduced_by_subject: fix: settlement clearing and return line validation
fixed_by_subject: fix: scope sales return lookups by delimiter
impact_summary: Invoice return validation could accidentally include movements from similarly prefixed invoice numbers and reject valid returns
notes: Original lookup used broad starting-with matching; fix now combines exact legacy lookup + delimiter-scoped prefix query with in-memory delimiter checks. Verified at HEAD on 2026-02-09.

regression_name: Send dealer credentials only after commit to avoid rollback leaks
fixed_by_subject: fix: close remaining P1 predeploy blockers
impact_summary: Credential email could be delivered for dealer/user records that later rolled back, leaking valid login material without durable account state
notes: Email side effect moved from inline transactional execution to TransactionSynchronization.afterCommit callback; add integration rollback test before promoting to FIXED_VERIFIED.

regression_name: Require inventory adjustment idempotency key at contract boundary
introduced_by_subject: CODE-RED E1: inventory adjustment idempotency + dates
fixed_by_subject: fix: close remaining P1 predeploy blockers
impact_summary: API contract previously marked idempotencyKey optional while workflow required it, causing caller ambiguity and late validation failures
notes: Contract now enforces @NotBlank and explicit header/body reconciliation path; targeted controller regression test passes at HEAD (2026-02-09).
